body.intention: I intend that a ticket or decision can point at the intention record it serves, so a build can be checked against the intention it claims to satisfy instead of against a prose sentence that dies with the ticket.

body.why: links.goals was an edge into an entity; T-skills-goals-to-intentions removed it and never added a successor, so 444 intentions accumulated as unpointable prose and 215 as null. A gate cannot check a hollow build against a null intention.
